summary: Tested AI Goals + Budgets enhancement feature. Backend: 11/11 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All critical UI elements working. Fixed a bug where budgets page displayed 'Monthly budget' instead of actual category names.

issues: Goals stored in localStorage are session-specific - goals created in one browser session don't persist to other sessions. This is expected behavior per current implementation but worth noting.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-goals returns 401 without auth
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-goals without insights returns success:false with message
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-goals returns BOTH 'goals' AND 'budgets' arrays
Backend: Generated goals have required fields (title, description, targetAmount, currentAmount, deadline, category)
Backend: Generated budgets have required fields (category, amount, period)
Backend: POST /api/budgets returns 401 without auth
Backend: POST /api/budgets with category field succeeds (maps to 'name' in DB)
Backend: POST /api/budgets with category=Marketing, amount=500, period=monthly succeeds
Backend: GET /api/budgets returns list of budgets
Backend: Budgets have category/name and amount fields
Backend: Full flow - generate goals+budgets, create via API, verify in GET
Frontend: Insights page loads (data-testid='insights-page')
Frontend: 'Generate Insights' button visible (data-testid='generate-insights-btn')
Frontend: Button text says 'Create Goals & Budgets from Insights' (data-testid='create-goals-btn')
Frontend: After creation, shows goals-created-message and budgets-created-message
Frontend: 'View Goals' button visible (data-testid='view-goals-btn')
Frontend: 'View Budgets' button visible (data-testid='view-budgets-btn')
Frontend: View Budgets navigates to /budgets
Frontend: Budgets page shows AI-created budgets with correct category names (Professional Services, Office Supplies, Meals, Marketing, Software)
Frontend: Goal Tracker page loads (data-testid='goal-tracker-page')
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing demo account with AI-generated budgets from previous test runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Goals + Budgets feature fully tested. The enhancement allows a single button click on the Insights page to create BOTH goals (saved to localStorage for Goal Tracker) AND budgets (saved to MongoDB via POST /api/budgets). Fixed a frontend bug where budgets page was displaying 'Monthly budget' instead of actual category names - the fix maps budget.name to budget.category for display. Backend endpoint POST /api/ai/generate-goals now returns {success, goals:[], budgets:[]}. Budget creation uses category field which maps to 'name' in the Budget model.

fixes_applied.issue: Budgets page displayed 'Monthly budget' instead of actual category names
fixes_applied.fix: Updated to use budget.name || budget.category for display, and added category field mapping in fetchData function
